history.text: Guinea became independent from France, marking a key step in modern statehood.
Guinea became a republic, replacing the previous constitutional arrangement.
4th constitution set or updated Guinea's constitutional framework.
Second Republic Day introduced a new form of state rule.
2021 Guinean coup d'état appears in Guinea's historical record.
